headline: EG Q1 Deep Dive: Profitability Focus Drives Earnings Beat Amid Revenue Decline
summary: Global reinsurance company Everest Group (NYSE:EG) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales falling 4.6% year on year to $4.07 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $16.08 per share was 15% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Everest Group (EG) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of global reinsurance company Everest Group (NYSE:EG) jumped 3.1% in the afternoon session after the company reported first-quarter 2026 earnings where a significant profit beat overshadowed a miss on the top line.
